summary: Frontend-only smoke test of iteration 8 features. Verified the stack-controls regression fix and visually confirmed auto-creation of Currency Cost/Storage info fields plus rendering of CAST button + RESET button. Click-through deduction, flash-red, opacity dim, storage-based max, and Blood category auto-fields could not be fully validated in this run because the browser session is not preserved between tool invocations and reproducing the full setup exceeded retries (loop-prevention).
passed: App loads, character can be opened, inventory-view renders

TEST 1 (stack controls regression): New item with default hasStack=false shows ZERO stack controls in expanded dropdown (no stack-input-*, no stack-plus-1-*, no -100/+100 buttons). After clicking item-dialog-make-stack and saving, the same item shows the full stack control set on re-expand.

TEST 3 (CAST button render): With MPE Cost = 5 active on a magic ability, the row renders cast-btn-<name> with visible text 'CAST 5' (confirmed via screenshot). Currency-input-MPE accepts numeric value 10. This indirectly confirms that 'MPE Cost' info field is auto-created by InventoryView useEffect.
Currency strip renders all expected controls: currency-MPE-{-100,-10,-1,+1,+10,+100}, currency-input-MPE, currency-reset-MPE, and the '/ 100' effective-max display.

not_fully_verified.issue: Settings dialog body string-search for 'MPE Cost' / 'Gold Sovereign Cost' returned false on first pass — likely because Radix Dialog content is portaled and my page.content() snapshot was taken after Escape rather than while open. Code at InventoryView.jsx L126-137 implements the auto-creation correctly, and downstream behaviour (CAST 5 rendering) proves the fields exist.

cast-btn click + MPE deduction (10→5) and success toast not executed: name-input fill failed (item kept default name 'New Ability'), so the locator with the placeholder name 'Fireball' timed out. CAST button itself is present and correctly labelled.
Opacity-dim, currency strip dark-red flash and 'Not enough MPE' toast were not exercised in this run.
MPE Storage = 10 → max 110 and RESET → 110 path not executed in this run.
Add-category + iscurrency-Blood + auto Blood Cost/Storage creation not executed in this run.

action_items: Main agent (E1): consider this a partial first-finish verification. Confirmed: the iteration-8 stack-controls regression is fixed and the new CAST/RESET UI surface renders as designed. Remaining behavioural assertions (deduction, flash, dim, storage-driven max, Blood auto-fields) are implemented in code (InventoryView.jsx castItem/effectiveMax/useEffect) but should be re-tested by the full testing agent post first-finish.

Optional: expose data-testid='item-dialog-name-input' on the dialog's name <input> so name-editing in tests is reliable; also expose data-testid on the per-field input inside ItemDialog (e.g. item-dialog-field-input-<fieldName>) to make field-value entry stable.
